zh.Great Budworth, Cheshire, England: 英國爾格亞特 布德沃斯
zh.Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾
zh.Nocton, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾諾可頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine de Venables於1410年出生在英國爾米德列維其時，她的父親Sir Hugh Venables26歲，母親Baroness Cecily Dutton15歲。她於1427年與Sir Robert Winnington, Lord在英國爾格亞特 布德沃斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1507年在英國英格蘭爾享年97歲。

zh-hans.Great Budworth, Cheshire, England: 英国爾格亞特 布德沃斯

zh-hans.Nocton, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾諾可頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine de Venables于1410年出生在英国爾米德列維其时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Venables26岁，母亲Baroness Cecily Dutton15岁。她于1427年与Sir Robert Winnington, Lord在英国爾格亞特 布德沃斯结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1507年在英国英格兰爾享年97岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine de Venables was born in 1410, in Middlewich, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Hugh Venables, was 26 and her mother, Baroness Cecily Dutton, was 15. She married Sir Robert Winnington, Lord in 1427, in Great Budworth, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1507, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 97.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine de Venables est née en 1410, à Middlewich, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Venables, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Baroness Cecily Dutton, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Winnington, Lord en 1427, à Great Budworth, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1507, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 97 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine de Venables 1410 in Middlewich, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Venables 26 und ihre Mutter Baroness Cecily Dutton 15. Sie hat 1427 in Great Budworth, Cheshire, England Sir Robert Winnington, Lord geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1507 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Venables è nata il nel 1410 nel Middlewich, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Sir Hugh Venables, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Baroness Cecily Dutton, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Winnington, Lord nel 1427, nel Great Budworth, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1507, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 97 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine de Venablesが1410年にイギリスチェシュアイアミッドルイチで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Venablesは26歳，母Baroness Cecily Duttonは15歳であった。1427年にイギリスチェシュアイアグレアト ブドウオルスでSir Robert Winnington, Lordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1507年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで97歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine de Venables(이)가 1410년 영국 체실르 미들루이치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Venables(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Baroness Cecily Dutton(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1427년 영국 체실르 그리트 버드워스에서 Sir Robert Winnington, Lord(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1507년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom: Ratae Coritanorum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Venables nasceu em 1410, em Middlewich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Venables, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Cecily Dutton, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Winnington, Lord em 1427, em Great Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1507, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 97 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine de Venables родилась в 1410 г. в местности миддльвич, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Venables было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Cecily Dutton, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Winnington, Lord в 1427 г. в местности грит будворт, чешир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1507 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 97 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine de Venables nació en 1410, en Middlewich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Venables, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Baroness Cecily Dutton, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Winnington, Lord en 1427, en Great Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1507, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 97 años.
